purpose: Declare the semantic boundary for invoking the Gemini Flash worker through Defracto dispatch, response, and evidence contracts.
mustDo: load declared Gemini Flash worker profile
capture provider response as worker response evidence
validate response shape before downstream promotion
emit response receipt without secret material
fail closed when credentials, dispatch, response shape, or receipt evidence are missing
mustNotDo: promote worker output to canonical truth without receipts
leak API keys into artifacts or evidence
require changes to the resolver repository
completionPosture: Gemini Flash worker invocation is acceptable only as loud, declared, receipted semantic lane work in this repo.
